daily.today_energy: Your intuition is running hot today, Scorpio. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower right now. Something's shifting beneath the surface, and you're picking up on it before anyone else even realizes it's there.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, this is a solid day to have that real conversation you've been sidestepping. Single? Someone's been noticing you more than you know. Either way, vulnerability is your vibe today.
daily.career: Your focus is sharp and your ideas hit different. This is the energy to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or tackle the project that actually matters to you. Your passion shows, and people respond to it.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and release—whether that's a workout, a long walk, or just dancing in your room. Channel that intense Scorpio energy into something that makes you feel alive and grounded.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about shedding what no longer serves you, Scorpio. Mercury's vibes are pushing you toward clarity and honest conversations. Trust your gut—it's been right before and it's right now.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Someone might surprise you with their depth. Don't overthink the signals; sometimes the simplest explanation hits different.
weekly.career: Your creative problem-solving is chef's kiss this week. A project or idea you've been sitting on deserves attention. Low-key confidence moves will get you further than big declarations.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for grounding activities—maybe walks, stretching, or something that connects you to the earth. Pay attention to what makes you feel solid and peaceful, not just productive.
